recommendations.title: The Big Hit
recommendations.overview: Affable hit man Melvin Smiley is constantly being scammed by his cutthroat colleagues in the life-ending business. So, when he and his fellow assassins kidnap the daughter of an electronics mogul, it's naturally Melvin who takes the fall when their p

recommendations.title: Officer Black Belt
recommendations.overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Green Dragons
recommendations.overview: A true immigrant story set against the vibrant backdrop of Flushing, N.Y. in the 1980s and 1990s.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs
recommendations.overview: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force. Years later, their older counterparts, Chen Wing Yan and Inspector Lau Kin Ming, respectiv
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: Infernal Affairs III
recommendations.overview: Triad gangster turned corrupt cop Lau Kin-ming goes to dangerous lengths to avoid detection.
recommendations.director: Alan Mak Siu-Fai, Andrew Lau Wai-Keung

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: Crime Story
recommendations.overview: A special agent is assigned to protect a wealthy business magnate. However, when the businessman is kidnapped in a daring ambush, he teams up with a seasoned detective to crack the case. But soon he discovers the case isn't that simple.

recommendations.title: The Big Brawl
recommendations.overview: A young Asian American martial artist is forced to participate in a brutal formal street-fight competition.

recommendations.title: Redirected
recommendations.overview: Four friends become stranded in Eastern Europe and have to become hit men, prostitutes, corrupt cops, smugglers and more to make it home.
